title: Find Palindrome With Fixed Length
titleCn: 找到指定长度的回文数

testcases.input: queries = [1,2,3,4,5,90], intLength = 3 Output: [101,111,121,131,141,999] Explanation: The first few palindromes of length 3 are: 101, 111, 121, 131, 141, 151, 161, 171, 181, 191, 202, ... The 90th palindrome of length 3 is 999.
testcases.expectedOutput: [101,111,121,131,141,999] Explanation: The first few palindromes of length 3 are: 101, 111, 121, 131, 141, 151, 161, 171, 181, 191, 202, ... The 90th palindrome of length 3 is 999.

testcases.input: queries = [2,4,6], intLength = 4 Output: [1111,1331,1551] Explanation: The first six palindromes of length 4 are: 1001, 1111, 1221, 1331, 1441, and 1551.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1111,1331,1551] Explanation: The first six palindromes of length 4 are: 1001, 1111, 1221, 1331, 1441, and 1551.
